_note: I45 P4: per-model token pricing for cost computation. USD per 1k tokens. Operator-edited (flagship/cheap pricing changes ~quarterly per Anthropic/OpenAI billing cycles). When a model_id is missing from this table, cost = 0.0 (warn at scrape time).
_2026_q2_review_note: I50 P2 truth-up (2026-05-03). All entries verified against published 2026-Q2 rates: Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet $3/M input + $15/M output unchanged; OpenAI gpt-4o $2.50/M input + $10/M output unchanged; OpenAI gpt-4o-mini $0.15/M input + $0.60/M output unchanged; Ollama nomic-embed-text local-zero; deterministic intent classifier rule-based-zero. Note: gpt-4o is now classified legacy by OpenAI (superseded by gpt-5.x in 2026); pricing retained for historical reproducibility on stored cassettes. Multi-model judge roster expansion is the I52 P1 deliverable; this entry intentionally only refreshes existing keys.
